title: [MTR4] Seoul Metro 2000 series (2nd batch)
description: Resource pack that adds Seoul Metro 2000 series (2nd batch) into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
*A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway.*

# Overview
In 2007, Seoul Metro introduced 32 sets of 2000 series built by Hyundai Rotem, similar to the previous batch. Out of these 32 sets:
1. 18 sets are built as a 10-car train
2. 11 sets are built with 8 cars, with 2 cars from the older 2000 series (chopper).
3. 3 sets are built as a 4-car train for Seongsu Branch
These trains replaced the older 2000 series that used chopper control.

In 2022 the tran cars from the older 2000 series are replaced by new train cars produced by Dawonsys.

This resource pack is to add Seoul Metro 2000 series (2nd batch) into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by Navi_LX9702 in July 2025.

# What will be in this pack?
### Seoul Metro 2000 series
1. 2nd batch

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Seoul Metro and its successor, Seoul Transport Corporation.
